channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 2 com severidade Crítica
• 7 com severidade Alta
• 6 novas CVEs
• 0 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-11769 - Grafana
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
We have released version 5.24.0 of the Grafana Operator. This patch includes a CRITICAL severity security fix for a path traversal/privilege escalation vulnerability in the Grafana Operator. ### Summary The Grafana Operator supports loading dashboards & library panels using the jsonnet data templating language. The jsonnet expression is evaluated in the context of the operator manager pod. ### Impact It is possible f...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-11769
 
🚨 CVE-2026-47172 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Quest Bot is an opensource modern Discord Bot built for moderation, utilities and support. Prior to version 1.0.3, the repository has a privileged deploy workflow that runs after the unprivileged build workflow completes. The build workflow runs on pull requests, and the deploy workflow checks out the triggering workflow’s head_sha, builds that code into a Docker image, pushes it as latest, and triggers production de...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47172
 
📰 Modernize with Virtualized Storage
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Editorial note: This blog was originally published on January 15, 2025 and has been updated to reflect VCF 9.1 updates. Are you planning on deploying or have you already stood up your VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) private cloud using VMware vSAN? If you have deployed or are thinking of deploying your VCF environment using vSAN, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/12/modernize-with-virtualized-storage/
 
📰 Monitor Claude activity in Elastic Security
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The agentic security operations platform By Jamie Hynds Sumana Mannem June 12, 2026 Share on Twitter Share on Twitter Share on LinkedIn Share on LinkedIn Share on Facebook Share on Facebook Share by Email Share by Email Print this page Print As more people across an organization start using Claude, security and compliance teams end up asking the same questions they ask about any other system: Who’s using it? It track...
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/monitor-claude-activity-in-elastic-security
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Critical Splunk Enterprise Flaw Lets Attackers Run Code Without Authentication
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Splunk has released security updates to address a critical security flaw in Splunk Enterprise that could be exploited to conduct unauthenticated file operations and even remote code execution. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20253, is rated 9.8 on the CVSS scoring system. "In Splunk Enterprise versions below 10.2.4 and 10.0.7, an unauthenticated user could create or truncate arbitrary
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/critical-splunk-enterprise-flaw-lets.html
 
🚨 Marking Your Own Homework (Check Point Remote Access VPN IKEv1 Authentication Bypass CVE-2026-50751) - watchTowr Labs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-50751 associada a Check Point. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxPbTVwTk5sbWpkc29rS3EyN1BVQXRkR1ppTFhyaU9YWWVoWkVadWFIbW5ERUg2bVB6Q0NWRFVQdkw4aUtEQzJMRVZsSVc1UkdRZG9jYmlNWU9CelY2cWdVclhXenEwWVpxRzZWUmpEc2RVci1nVmZsSWhPWERSYWlISV9lZDN6aGpobXhWNGxwS1pnR3FJNk5DRWVvQ3ZzM2tmbW95ejRobExUNXgxQ3A4ZEk5VnNVdTNTOWFIczRld2FVd1NQ?oc=5
 
📰 phpBB forum fixes auth bypass bug lurking for a decade
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A 10-year-old authentication bypass vulnerability discovered in the phpBB forum software allows an attacker to log in as any user, including administrators.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/phpbb-forum-fixes-auth-bypass-bug-lurking-for-a-decade/
 
📰 Agentjacking Attack Tricks AI Coding Agents Into Running Malicious Code
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have described what they say is a new class of attack that can trick artificial intelligence (AI) coding agents into running arbitrary code on developer machines. Called Agentjacking by Tenet Security, the attack can be triggered by means of a fake error report crafted using Sentry, an open-source error-tracking and performance-monitoring platform.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/agentjacking-attack-tricks-ai-coding.html
 
📰 Ukrainian national pleads guilty to role in Conti ransomware operation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A Ukrainian national extradited from Ireland to the United States last year has pleaded guilty to conspiracy charges tied to the Conti ransomware operation.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ukrainian-national-pleads-guilty-to-role-in-conti-ransomware-operation/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-46697 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Fediverse Embeds embeds fediverse posts on WordPress sites. Prior to version 1.5.8, Fediverse Embeds registered an unauthenticated REST route ftf/media-proxy (includes/Media_Proxy.php) with permission_callback => __return_true that accepted a base64-encoded URL and forwarded it to wp_remote_get($url) without enforcing any allowlist. The plugin's source contained a comment block explicitly acknowledging that the reque...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46697
 
🚨 CVE-2026-44170 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
MariaDB server is a community developed fork of MySQL server. From versions 10.6.1 to before 10.6.26, 10.11.1 to before 10.11.17, 11.4.1 to before 11.4.11, 11.8.1 to before 11.8.7, and 12.3.1, MariaDB on WIndows with installed CONNECT engine and enabled REST support interpolated table HTTP attribute into the curl command line without proper sanitizing. This allows the user to execute shell commands on the server. Thi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44170
 
📰 USN-8424-1: Ubuntu Kylin Software Center vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Ubuntu Kylin Software Center incorrectly handled user-supplied input in its D-Bus service. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to gain administrative privileges.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8424-1
 
📰 Belle Maison Teams Up with "Attack on Titan" for Tokyo Station 110th Anniversary Merch! - 玩具人 TOY PEOPLE
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiUEFVX3lxTE1KTDRtZV9nOHo3bVFpc2l4aEVFWUs5LXZVRUoxbm9yNHhqTm9WQUotR2lVcy1NQ3B4TWdoXy1JNlROVmhXdldBWHd2U1lPYUpw?oc=5
 
📰 Microsoft fixes WUSA bug during Patch Tuesday - Techzine Global
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilgFBVV95cUxPTzQ1YnBWU1lKSl9leE5BZ1RSUjVfdWdvbWR3SS1UNnRXNEFtMi03WFlvR2xOd0h6b2RZQ292SUNPZXM2dUpFMGZ4Y0llcTcxS3FtOWZRRFVLa0x6U2FZU3UyM2gzemkxMWNZQWx4UlFZMTZvSlc1Vl9tUzMzYUF3UkY2a05NQzYtcEpRUVNBRU1yWnhKaFE?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 11/06/2026 até 13/06/2026.
